acquisition method: The mass spectrometer was operated in a data-dependent mode.
alkylation reagent: fixed modification was carbamidomethylation of cysteine; variable modification was methionine oxidation.
alkylation concentration: alkylated (50 mM iodoacetamide, room temperature in the dark for 1 h).
cleavage agent: Proteins were subsequently digested with trypsin (sequencing grade, Promega)...
collision energy: with a NCE of 28 and dynamic exclusion of 30 s.
fractionation method: In a gel-filtration chromatography, heme (616 Da) co-eluted with the NTD (8.6 kDa)...
fragmentation method: The mass spectrometer was operated in a data-dependent mode.
ionization type: before nanoelectrospray using a QExactive mass spectrometer.
reduction reagent: Eluted fraction was supplemented with β-mercaptoethanol (f.c. 2 mM)...
reduction concentration: Eluted fraction was supplemented with β-mercaptoethanol (f.c. 2 mM)...
